title: calluna vulgaris subf. serotina
intro: Calluna vulgaris subf. serotina, commonly known as the heather, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to Europe and North America. This shrub has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Calluna vulgaris subf. serotina have been found to help alleviate respiratory problems, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and prevent diseases.
